thirdParty.inner_text: **Hands-Down the Best Social Casino Out There!** I’m a Texan-born, ranch-country boy living in Ohio, and I’ll shoot it to you straight: I like to win, and Yayz Social Casino is the only place that truly makes that happen. First and foremost, their Customer Support is the quickest and most amazing I have ever encountered. While other sites leave you on read for hours until you just give up, Yayz Social Casino is instantly on it. A massive shoutout specifically to their Customer Service Specialist, Jim Alison—he is absolutely amazing! He is incredibly personable, sincere, and genuinely just wants to help make your day better. We all have our ups and downs in this space, if you know what I mean, and having support like his is a game-changer. The bonuses here are fantastic, too. You just need to know where to look (check your email and their Discord) or simply don't be afraid to ask. Like I said, their support team is top-tier and always happy to help. When it comes to the gameplay, the table games are really where it’s at! But when you need a break from winning at the tables, you can jump right into their slots and some of the absolute best exclusive games in the social casino world. On the technical side, everything runs incredibly crisp. We all know how other sites mysteriously start glitching the second you get on a hot streak. Not here. At Yayz Social Casino, when you're up, the platform stays running smooth, and the RTP% stays consistent. I hope y'all enjoy this place as much as I do. Highly recommend!

thirdParty.inner_text: I gave them one star because they actually had a couple of fragrances that I enjoyed. Other than that, I would have rated them negatively if I could have. Everything started off good but quickly went south!!!! After numerous calls and emails to customer service, I got nowhere!!!!! Their customer service is a joke!!!!! They cannot even return an email!!!! I had to contact them multiple times before I even got a response. These guys are great if you don't mind paying full price and only receiving about 3/4 of what you thought you would get. ALL of the scents that I ordered stopped diffusing when there was STILL 1/4 - 1/2 in. of liquid remaining in the glass container and they are trying to tell me that that is normal!!!! Well, I did not pay for an almost full bottle, I paid for a full bottle!!!!!! In essence, I got taken advantage of on every single bottle and they refuse to do anything to rectify the situation!!!!! Ridiculous!!!!! DEFINITELY NOT WORTH THE MONEY AND I WILL NEVER BUY FROM THEM AGAIN!!!!!!!!! BEWARE!!!!!!!

thirdParty.inner_text: I cannot thank Add More Magic enough! We are just 6 days away from our Magic Kingdom trip, and I had been trying to get an earlier appointment at Bibbidi Bobbidi Boutique for my daughter. She wanted to have her hair and makeup done before our lunch at Cinderella's Castle, but I wasn't having any luck finding a better time. After signing up and submitting a request through Add More Magic, they were able to secure an earlier appointment for us in just a couple of hours! Their service was incredibly fast, easy to use, and took away so much of the stress of planning our Disney vacation. The best part is that we're keeping it a surprise for our daughter until our Magic Kingdom day. She is going to be absolutely thrilled when she finds out! Thank you, Add More Magic, for helping make this special trip even more magical. I highly recommend your service to anyone looking for hard-to-get Disney reservations!

thirdParty.inner_text: I ordered a solar fountain pump from this company and never received it. They provided 2 Bogus tracking numbers. I got an email saying my order was delivered to my home, I never received it. I reached out to them explaining the situation. They told me to contact my local PO and have them track the number. The PO stated that the tracking numbers they gave me could not be found and don't exist. I reached back out to the company to either send me a new one, or please reimburse me since I never received the item. They have refused any further communication. Be aware of this company!!!!!
